name: Mexican Chicken #t Noodles Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken or turkey; cooked and chopped up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave casserole dish, add celery, peppers, onion, and butter.
Cook for 2 minutes.
2. Remove from the dish.
3. Line the casserole with tortilla strips.
4. In another bowl, stir together soup, milk, sour cream, and cheese.
Mix well.
5. Add cooked vegetables, noodles, chicken, mushrooms, and Jalepenos.
6. Pour into the casserole.
7. Top with sliced almonds.
8. Microwave until heated through, 2-4 minutes.
